name: Closed-Won Journey Retrospective
description: See what a winning deal actually looks like: the touches, the sequence, the timing, and the content that closes revenue in your business.
alsoSurfaces: What does the median winning journey look like, end to end?
Which touches and content assets reliably appear in won deals?
How does winning sequence differ by segment?
What's the typical time-to-close and where does it stretch?
beforeWeRun: Cohort: closed-won in the last 90 days, last 4 quarters, or custom?
Segment: by deal size, region, or persona?
Touches to include: marketing only, or marketing + sales sequencing?

whatYoullGet.name: Situation summary
whatYoullGet.desc: One-paragraph framing of the cohort and key takeaways.

whatYoullGet.name: Median journey
whatYoullGet.desc: The typical winning sequence with timing markers.

whatYoullGet.name: Top reliable touches
whatYoullGet.desc: Touches that appear in N% or more of winning deals.

whatYoullGet.name: Segment differences
whatYoullGet.desc: How winning patterns vary by deal size or vertical.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & methodology
whatYoullGet.desc: How journeys were stitched and what was excluded.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your retrospective memo in ~14 min.
